tables.description: Tobacco and Alcohol Questionnaire: Questionnaire data from the Wave 5 and Wave 6 Tobacco and Alcohol Use questionnaire. The data include information on participant's age when they first drank or smoked, how much they drank or smoked during the past 30 days, and if any attempts to quit smoking occurred in the past year.

variables.name: AgeAtFirstDrink
variables.description: How old were you when you had your first drink of alcohol other than a few sips?

variables.name: AgeAtFirstSmoke
variables.description: How old were you when you smoked a whole cigarette for the first time?

variables.name: CigarettesPerDay
variables.description: During the past 30 days, on the days you smoked, how many cigarettes did you smoke per day?

variables.name: DaysAlcInLife
variables.description: During your life, on how many days have you had at least one drink of alcohol?

variables.name: DaysDrinkPastMonth
variables.description: During the past 30 days, on how many days did you have at least one drink of alcohol?

variables.name: DaysSmokePerMonth
variables.description: During the past 30 days, on how many days did you smoke cigarettes?

variables.name: OtherTobaccoPastMonth
variables.description: During the past 30 days, on how many days did you use chewing tobacco, snuff, or dip such as Redman, Levi Garrett, Beechnut, Skoal, Skoal Bandits, or Copenhagen?

variables.name: QuitSmokingAttempt
variables.description: During the past 12 months, did you ever try to quit smoking?

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: WAVE
variables.description: Wave questionnaire was given (Wave 5 corresponds to participants being approximately 15 years old; Wave 6 corresponds to participants being approx. 17 years old)

tables.description: Dental Exams: Surface-level dental exam data (permanent teeth only) from Wave 2, Wave 4, Wave 6, and Wave 9. The occlusal mesial and occlusal distal surface on maxillary molars were collapsed into one surface. Data includes the numeric caries code for permanent dentition, caries code translated into character "status" variable which indicates status of decay and/or fillings, indicator for any sealant, indicator for whether any sealant is fully retained, indicator for whether lesions are separate or recurrent for any fillings or sealants, indicator for whether the surface has a cavitated lesion or filling, indicator for whether the surface is missing due to caries, indicator for whether the surface is missing due to reasons other than caries, indicator for whether surface is primarily a pit and fissure surface, indicator for whether lesion present on the surface is located on a pit and fissure or smooth portion of the surface.

variables.name: PitFissureSurface
variables.description: Indicator for whether or not a surface is considered pit and fissure.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: Surface
variables.description: Surface label for tooth.

variables.name: Tooth
variables.description: Tooth number, ranging from 1 to 32. Although the 3rd molars were scored at the age 23 year exam, they were not present to be scored for most participants. For the age 9 exam, only permanent teeth scored are included in this dataset.

variables.name: caries_code13
variables.description: Label for the caries/filling status of each permanent tooth surface at the age 13 exam.

variables.name: caries_code17
variables.description: Label for the caries/filling status of each permanent tooth surface at the age 17 exam.

variables.name: caries_code23
variables.description: Label for the caries/filling status of each permanent tooth surface at the age 23 exam.

variables.name: caries_code9
variables.description: Label for the caries/filling status of each permanent tooth surface at the age 9 exam.

tables.description: MDCT: Multidetector CT (MDCT) scans of the distal tibia as well as the GAMMEX phantom were obtained for subjects from Wave 7 and Wave 9. The Flash scanner was used for Wave 7, while the Force scanner was applied to Wave 9. Data includes the Wave number, image type, body site, filename, file type, and year of the scan for each subject.

tables.description: Dental Exams: Surface-level fluorosis, hypoplasia, and opacity data (primary teeth only) from the Wave 1 and Wave 2 dental exams. Data includes the Tooth Surface Index of Fluorosis (TSIF) for each tooth surface.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: Surface
variables.description: Label for primary tooth surface.

variables.name: TSIF_Tooth5
variables.description: Tooth Surface Index of Fluorosis score for the buccal, lingual, and (if applicable) occlusal primary tooth surfaces at the age 5 exam.

variables.name: TSIF_Tooth9
variables.description: Tooth Surface Index of Fluorosis score for the buccal, lingual, and (if applicable) occlusal primary tooth surfaces at the age 9 exam. The primary second molars are the only primary teeth scored for fluorosis at the age 9 exam.

variables.name: Tooth
variables.description: Primary tooth letter, ranging from A to T. For the age 9 exam, only primary teeth scored are included in this dataset.

tables.description: Dental Exams: Zone-level fluorosis, hypoplasia, and opacity data (primary teeth only) from the Wave 1 and Wave 2 dental exams. The buccal surface was split into three buccal thirds or zones and each of these were scored with an indicator of any fluorosis or no fluorosis. Data includes the indicator of fluorosis for each zone and a "zone level" score.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: TSIF_Buccal5
variables.description: Tooth Surface Index of Fluorosis score for the buccal thirds at the age 5 exam.

variables.name: TSIF_Buccal9
variables.description: Tooth Surface Index of Fluorosis score for the buccal thirds at the age 9 exam (primary 2nd molars only).

variables.name: Tooth
variables.description: Tooth letter, ranging from A to T. Only the primary teeth scored at age 9 are included in this data set.

variables.name: Zone
variables.description: Label for buccal zone.
